Planning the S1 implementation across three files. `types.ts` will hold all type definitions. `calculator.ts` will contain the `assess()` function. `validation.ts` will define the Zod schema and validation logic.

Also planning `copy.ts` for outcome state copy, `framing.ts` for the notice, `index.ts` for exports, and `personas.ts` for minimal persona data. Considering synthetic test fixtures and whether to split tests across multiple files or consolidate them.

Tests will live under `tests/s1/`. Zod needs to be added to dependencies. Validation will return a discriminated union with either parsed data or a list of errors. Each outcome state in `copy.ts` will get its own exported function.

Money formatting will use £ and convert pence to pounds by dividing by 100. Persona calculations are now set: Pat has a £140,000 surplus; Sam is near breakeven at 2.56% of income; Jordan has a £28,000 shortfall.

Alex has zero income and a £133,000 shortfall. Riley has no starting snapshot. Casey has a £8,000 surplus and irregular income. Morgan-Drew has a £30,000 surplus. Sam’s real disposable income is £5,000, while the near-breakeven test fixture uses roughly £186,000 in expenditure.</details></think>

**S010 `/implement S1` is complete.** The pure affordability domain module is in place with all matching tests green.

## Scope delivered

| Test | What it verifies |
|---|---|
| **T1** | `no-data` branch — `band === null`, zero disposable, reasons text |
| **T2** | `zero-income` branch — distinct from shortfall |
| **T3** | `shortfall` — cites £ gap and largest outgoing |
| **T4** | `breakeven` — income exactly meets outgoings |
| **T5** | `surplus` + near-breakeven note when disposable ≤ 5% of income |
| **T6** | Integer-pence invariant across all I&E fixtures |
| **T7** | Validation rejects negative, non-numeric, oversize, and blank labels |
| **T8** | All seven personas from `lib/personas.ts` match expected outcomes |
| **T29** | `copy.ts` passes tone and advice-implying token guards |

## New files

- `lib/affordability/` — `types`, `calculator` (`assess`), `validation` (zod), `copy`, `framing`, `format`
- `lib/personas.ts` — seven persona I&E fixtures (needed by T8 before S3 cookie auth)
- `tests/_fixtures/ie.ts` — synthetic fixtures from TEST_PLAN §2.1
- `tests/s1/` — one test file per T* above

## Verification

```
npm test        → 37 passed
npm run lint    → pass
npm run typecheck → pass
```

## Notes

- **`zod`** added as a production dependency for `validation.ts`.
- **`lib/personas.ts`** shipped here (decision D-62) because T8 requires it and S1 precedes S3 in the build order; cookie auth and DB seeding remain S3.
- **`framing.ts`** is implemented as part of the S1 module per the tech spec; T43 (framing guard) is still owned by S9.

Changes are uncommitted. Next recommended slice: **`/implement S2`** (persistence layer, T9–T12).
